testcase.name: @AfterClass tearDown
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.remote.UnreachableBrowserException: Error communicating with the remote browser. It may have died. Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.8' Driver info: testcase.name: verify_loginDDT
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: An exception occurred: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"link text","selector":"Login"} (Session info: MicrosoftEdge=147.0.3912.72) For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.8' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver Command: [3e81e0142a6c60dc98d80a181e9fb05c, findElement {value=Login, using=link text}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: MicrosoftEdge, browserVersion: 147.0.3912.72, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:processID: 17124, ms:edgeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:49360}, msedge: {msedgedriverVersion: 147.0.3912.72 (d4380ba2b9dc..., userDataDir: C:\Users\sree\AppData\Local...}, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: Windows 11, proxy: Proxy(), se:bidiEnabled: false, se:cdp: ws://192.168.1.103:4444/ses..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.3912.72, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 3e81e0142a6c60dc98d80a181e9fb05c at testCases.TC_003_LoginDDT.verify_loginDDT(TC_003_LoginDDT.java:73) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583) ...
